x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Discovery credentials are required to authenticate and collect detailed CI attributes. Gaps in credential coverage mean Now Assist receives partial or empty CI data for uncovered infrastructure classes.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure discovery credentials for all key CI classes via discovery_credential_list.do. Ensure coverage across Windows (WMI), Linux (SSH), Network (SNMP), VMware (vCenter API), and Cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP). Credential gaps mean Now Assist ITOM receives partial or empty CI data.
